title: One recursive call + linear work is linear (Master Theorem)
statement_informal: Any cost obeying T(n) <= T(n/2)+n satisfies T(2^k) <= 2^(k+1) (linear, O(n)).

cost_model.notes: T(n)=T(n/2)+n is dominated by the top level: total ~ 2n.

references: Master theorem (case a < b^d); Cormen et al.; cf. Knuth's divide-and-conquer analyses.
